name: Snow Forest Playful Portrait
description: Playful winter portrait of woman laughing in snow with fluffy boots and winter accessories
input_prompt: woman laughing in snowy forest wearing fluffy boots and winter outfit

subject.description: young woman with striking high-fashion yet approachable features, rich dark brown brunette hair, intense blue-gray almond-shaped eyes, fair porcelain skin with light natural freckles

physical_details.body_type: athletic toned curvaceous hourglass, feminine athletic build

skin.texture: smooth dewy glowing with realistic pores
skin.details: light natural freckles across nose and cheeks

hair.color: rich dark brown/brunette with warm and cool undertones, subtle highlights

face.details: eyes: striking intense blue-gray almond-shaped, looking upward or squinting from laughter; eyebrows: thick prominent dark arched; nose: small straight; lips: full plump glossy, mouth open in laughter; structure: defined yet soft jawline, high cheekbones

subject.expression_mood: laughing joyfully, playful, energetic, winter fun

clothing.details: bare from thigh to boot top

accessories: white fluffy faux-fur hat or earmuffs
white-rimmed sunglasses or goggles worn on face
white furry cuffs or gloves on wrists

pose_action.position: sitting on snow, leaning back on hands, knees bent upwards
pose_action.camera_relation: eye-level or slightly angled downward, medium shot
pose_action.dynamic_elements: head thrown back in laughter, joyful expression

background: dense forest of tall pine trees with dark trunks
wooden structure/cabin deck visible in background right among trees
environment.ground: thick uneven layer of white snow with footprints and indentations
environment.atmosphere: playful winter fun, cold crisp air

camera_technical.resolution: high resolution capturing snow and fur textures

flattened_prompt: high-resolution iPhone mobile photography, young woman striking high-fashion features, rich dark brown brunette hair, intense blue-gray almond eyes, fair porcelain skin light freckles across nose and cheeks, full glossy lips mouth open laughing, athletic toned curvaceous hourglass figure, black sleeveless bodysuit white trim, white fluffy faux-fur hat, white-rimmed sunglasses, white furry wrist cuffs, large white fluffy moon boots, bare legs thigh to boot, sitting on snow leaning back on hands knees up head thrown back laughing, snowy forest clearing dense pine trees dark trunks snow on branches, thick white snow footprints visible, wooden cabin structure background, natural overcast daylight soft diffused no harsh shadows, eye-level iPhone shot sharp focus, playful energetic winter fun mood, 3:4 vertical
negative_prompt_flat: studio lighting, professional setup, perfect posed, fashion editorial, cartoon, 3d render, anime, oversaturated, HDR

midjourney.prompt: iPhone photo, young woman dark brunette hair blue eyes freckles, laughing joyfully in snow, black bodysuit white fluffy hat sunglasses moon boots, sitting on snow knees up, snowy forest pine trees cabin background, overcast soft daylight, playful winter energy --ar 3:4 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic iPhone look

ideogram.prompt: Young woman laughing joyfully in snowy forest, dark brunette hair and blue-gray eyes, wearing black bodysuit with white fluffy hat, sunglasses, and large white moon boots, sitting on snow leaning back, pine trees and wooden cabin in background, soft overcast winter light

recraft.prompt: Woman laughing in snowy forest, dark hair blue eyes, black bodysuit white fluffy accessories and moon boots, sitting on snow, pine trees cabin, soft winter light

luma.prompt: Snowy forest clearing, woman throws her head back laughing, fluffy white boots kick up snow, pine trees sway gently, soft flurries drift down, playful winter moment full of joy
luma.motion_notes: Head throwing back in laughter, snow being kicked up, gentle snowfall, tree branch movement

reve.prompt: Candid winter photography in the style of playful lifestyle content, young woman laughing in snow wearing contrasting black and white outfit, snowy forest setting, soft overcast light, joyful energetic mood

grok-imagine.prompt: Woman laughing in snowy forest, dark brunette hair blue eyes freckles, black bodysuit white fluffy hat sunglasses moon boots, sitting on snow leaning back, pine trees and cabin, soft winter light, playful energy

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A striking young woman in her early twenties sits on thick white snow in a forest clearing, laughing joyfully with her head thrown back. She has rich dark brown brunette hair that falls long and slightly wavy, with intense blue-gray almond-shaped eyes squinting from genuine laughter. Her fair porcelain skin shows light natural freckles across her nose and cheeks, with a smooth dewy texture. She has an athletic, toned curvaceous figure with feminine curves. She wears a black sleeveless bodysuit with white trim piping along the edges, paired with a white fluffy faux-fur hat, white-rimmed sunglasses worn on her face, and white furry cuffs on her wrists. Large white fluffy moon boots with laces cover her feet, with her bare legs visible from thigh to boot top. She leans back on her hands with her knees bent upward in a playful pose. Dense pine trees with dark trunks and snow-covered branches surround the clearing, with a wooden cabin structure visible in the background. Natural overcast daylight provides soft, diffused illumination with no harsh shadows. The thick uneven snow shows footprints and indentations around her. No studio lighting. No fashion editorial look. Realistic snow and fur textures.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman with dark brunette hair and blue-gray eyes laughing joyfully in snowy forest clearing, light freckles on fair skin, athletic figure in black bodysuit with white trim, white fluffy hat sunglasses and moon boots, sitting on snow leaning back on hands with knees up, pine trees with snow-covered branches and wooden cabin in background, natural overcast daylight with soft diffused lighting, iPhone photography aesthetic capturing playful winter energy, not overly posed or editorial
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A joyful young woman throws her head back in genuine laughter while sitting on snow in a forest clearing. Her dark brunette hair frames striking blue-gray eyes and natural freckles on fair porcelain skin. She wears a black sleeveless bodysuit with white trim, contrasting with white fluffy accessories - a faux-fur hat, sunglasses, wrist cuffs, and large moon boots. Her athletic figure is positioned playfully, leaning back on her hands with knees bent. Dense pine trees laden with snow surround the scene, with a wooden cabin visible in the background. Soft overcast winter light creates flattering, shadow-free illumination. Authentic candid moment capturing pure winter joy.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Add gently falling snowflakes throughout the scene while keeping the woman's laughing expression, pose, and winter outfit exactly the same. Preserve the soft overcast lighting and snowy forest background.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed facial features (eye shape, brow description), specific boot style (moon boots)
2_realism_anchors: 'visible snow texture', 'fluffy fur texture', 'skin pores', 'natural freckles'
3_technical_camera: 'iPhone mobile camera', 'standard wide lens', specified perspective
4_negative_hygiene: excludes fashion editorial and professional setup aesthetics
5_spatial_consistency: 'sitting on snow', 'leaning back on hands', 'knees bent upwards'
6_lighting_storytelling: 'overcast soft diffused' = flattering winter portrait mood
7_expression_capture: 'head thrown back in laughter' captures genuine joy
